title: distimake palmeri
side_effects: Distimake palmeri can have side effects if used improperly, such as rapid heartbeat, nausea, and dizziness due to its high levels of toxic compounds like palmerin and distimerin. Prolonged exposure to these toxins can also lead to liver damage, respiratory problems, and even hallucinations in severe cases. Some users have reported experiencing tremors, muscle weakness, and skin irritation after ingesting or applying the plant's extracts without proper guidance. Additionally, excessive consumption of distimake palmeri has been linked to an increased risk of seizures, coma, and even death in extreme instances.
